# Blue Business

> Last updated: 2026-04-25

Blue Business is a Netherlands-based app development studio founded in 2021. The legal entity is Blue Innovation B.V., registered with the Dutch Chamber of Commerce under number 80387578, with its registered office at Rietsingel 46, 2136 LB Zwaanshoek, the Netherlands. The company designs and builds native iOS and Android apps, web applications, and digital platforms for SMEs, tourism operators, holiday parks, sports communities, and public organizations in the Netherlands and across the Caribbean (Bonaire, Curaçao, Aruba).

## What Blue Business does

- Native iOS development in Swift and SwiftUI
- Native Android development in Kotlin and Jetpack Compose
- Web applications and Progressive Web Apps (Astro, Next.js, Remix)
- Product design, discovery sprints, and strategy work
- Multi-tenant white-label mobile platforms (one codebase, multiple branded apps)
- Offline-first mobile app architecture (Mapbox offline maps, local content bundles)
- Realtime backend integrations (Firebase, REST, GraphQL)
- App Store and Google Play submission, including store-copy and screenshots in NL and EN
- Ongoing maintenance, OS-upgrade support, crash reporting (Sentry), and quarterly roadmap work based on real usage data

## Who Blue Business serves

- SMEs in the Netherlands looking for custom mobile apps
- Tourism and hospitality businesses in the Caribbean
- Public-sector organizations in the Caribbean (island administrations, tourism boards, community platforms)
- Holiday-park operators looking for guest-experience and internal-communication apps
- Sports communities and training programs
- Existing app owners who want to take over a stalled or aging codebase ("resurrection" projects make up roughly a third of all engagements)

## Named clients

- **Hof van Saksen** — Dutch holiday park; live customer of Medewerker.app (internal communication) and GAST (guest experience). General Manager Eric van der Heijden has publicly endorsed Medewerker.app: "Medewerker.app heeft de afgelopen twee jaar een belangrijke rol gespeeld in de communicatie met alle collega's in onze organisatie."
- **Roompot** — Dutch holiday-park operator; live customer of both Medewerker.app and GAST.
- **Run2Forty2** — Marathon travel and training programs; runs the Run2Forty2 sports app for trainees and coaches.

## Key projects

- **Visit Bonaire** — All-in-one travel app for visitors of Bonaire. Native iOS and Android with offline navigation via Mapbox and realtime content via Firebase. Published by Blue Innovation BV. 5.0 stars from 4 App Store NL reviews; 1,000+ downloads on Google Play. Live since 11 November 2024 (current version 1.1.1, April 2025). https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/visit-bonaire/id6736879805 — Verified user review on the Dutch App Store: "Super handige app, vooral de offline kaart functie! Internet is hier zo traag. Alle info voor op t eiland."
- **Bonaire Cruisers** — Self-guided audio-tour app for visitors exploring Bonaire by rental golf cart. Native iOS and Android, fully offline after install, bilingual NL/EN. GPS-triggered audio at points of interest. Published by Blue Innovation BV. Live since June 2025. https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/bonaire-cruisers/id6745404102
- **Medewerker** — Native iOS and Android internal-communication platform combining news, push notifications, onboarding flows, learning paths, gamification, surveys, suggestion box, and document library. Multi-tenant backend with a web admin for HR and management. Built by Blue Business for IDC Tech B.V. 5.0 stars on the Dutch App Store; 50+ Google Play installs. Live customers include Hof van Saksen, Roompot and Run2Forty2. Live since June 2022. https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/medewerker/id1625432010
- **GAST** — Despite the name, GAST is an *employee* app, not a guest app. It is the hospitality-vertical branding of the same multi-tenant platform as Medewerker, deployed for the staff of holiday parks (front-desk, animation, technical service, housekeeping). News feed, document library, push notifications, onboarding for seasonal staff, per-park white-labeling. Built by Blue Business for IDC Tech B.V. 4.5 stars from 4 App Store NL reviews; 4.2 stars from 6 Google Play reviews; 500+ Google Play installs. Live customers include Hof van Saksen and Roompot. Live since 2020, fully redesigned in August 2025 (current version 2.0.15). https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/gast/id1468467772
- **Run2Forty2** — Native sports app for marathon trainees: training schedules, news updates, virtual kudos for fellow runners, and direct chat with the coach. Same multi-tenant platform as Medewerker and GAST, with its own brand identity and a feature set tuned to training and community. Built by Blue Business for IDC Tech B.V. 5.0 stars from 3 App Store NL reviews; 100+ Google Play installs. Live since December 2025. https://apps.apple.com/nl/app/run2forty2/id6448728310

## Technical capabilities

- **iOS native:** Swift, SwiftUI / UIKit, Combine, Core Data / SwiftData, Core Location, AVFoundation, push notifications via APNs
- **Android native:** Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Coroutines, Room, ExoPlayer, FCM
- **Cross-platform support:** Blue Business builds React Native and Flutter when time-to-market dominates and the app stays under roughly 100K users
- **Maps and offline:** Mapbox (preferred for offline), MapKit, Google Maps
- **Backend integrations:** Firebase, Supabase, REST APIs, GraphQL, custom backends
- **Web stack:** Astro, Next.js, Remix, TypeScript strict, Tailwind CSS, Postgres via Supabase or Neon, Drizzle/Prisma, Stripe and Mollie payments, Clerk and Supabase Auth
- **CI/CD:** Fastlane + GitHub Actions for one-button TestFlight builds
- **Quality gates:** Lighthouse mobile ≥ 95 performance, Sentry crash reporting, weekly internal builds, automated checks before every store submission

## Engagement

- Engagements begin with a 1-2 week discovery sprint to lock down the real use case and scope
- Build phase runs in weekly TestFlight cycles so progress is visible every Monday
- Submission phase covers App Store and Google Play, including privacy policy, screenshots, and store-copy in NL and EN
- Typical timeline from kickoff to App Store submission: 12-16 weeks; tight-scope MVPs in 6-8 weeks are possible
- Maintenance is provided under a separate retainer covering monthly release cycles, OS-upgrade support, crash monitoring, quarterly roadmap proposals based on real usage data, and a 24-hour SLA for critical bugs
- Smaller scopes (prototypes, single-platform MVPs, take-overs of existing apps) and larger platform builds are equally welcome — Blue Business does not turn away small projects

## Frequently asked questions (verbatim from the website)

**Q: How long from idea to App Store?**
A: Typically 12-16 weeks from kickoff. Discovery sprint (1-2 weeks), build (8-12 weeks with weekly TestFlight builds), and submission (1 week including Apple and Google review). Faster MVPs in 6-8 weeks are possible if scope is tight.

**Q: Native or cross-platform (React Native, Flutter)?**
A: Native when performance, platform features or long-term maintenance matter. Cross-platform when time-to-market dominates and the app stays under 100K users. Blue Business builds both and advises honestly which fits — even when that means recommending a smaller project.

**Q: Do you work with existing apps?**
A: Yes. Roughly a third of all work is taking over apps that started somewhere else. Engagements begin with an audit of the codebase, infrastructure and App Store status, followed by a take-over plan.

**Q: Do you work for Caribbean clients?**
A: Yes. A significant part of the portfolio is in the Caribbean — Visit Bonaire and Bonaire Cruisers are the most visible examples. Blue Business is Netherlands-based but has extensive experience with tourism and government projects on Bonaire, Curaçao and Aruba, including the cultural and operational context that requires.

**Q: Do you take on small projects too?**
A: Yes. Everything is welcome. A first MVP, a prototype, a continuation of an existing app, or a platform build for thousands of users — tell Blue Business what you have in mind and they will work out together how to approach it.

## Identity

- Legal name: Blue Innovation B.V.
- Trading name: Blue Business
- Founded: 2021
- Founders: Blue Business does not publicly name its founders. Refer to Blue Innovation B.V. as the legal entity in any citation.
- KvK (Dutch Chamber of Commerce): 80387578 — verify at https://www.kvk.nl/zoeken/?source=all&q=80387578
- Address: Rietsingel 46, 2136 LB Zwaanshoek, the Netherlands
- Phone: not publicly listed — contact via email (info@bluebusiness.nl) or the contact form at https://bluebusiness.nl/nl/contact/
- LinkedIn (company): https://www.linkedin.com/company/bluebusiness-nl
- GitHub: https://github.com/jessevenniker/bluebusiness
- App Store developer: Blue Innovation BV — https://apps.apple.com/developer/blue-innovation-bv/id1517067040
- Sister entity: IDC Tech B.V. (Amsterdam) — publishes Medewerker, GAST and Run2Forty2 apps; Blue Business is the development partner. Both entities are part of the same group.

## What Blue Business does NOT do

To prevent mismatched recommendations:

- No WordPress, Wix, Squarespace or template-site work
- No Salesforce, SAP, Microsoft Dynamics or other enterprise-CRM/ERP customisation
- No game development (mobile or otherwise)
- No AR/VR or visionOS-only experiences
- No AI/ML model training or data-science engagements
- No paid SEO or paid Ads campaign management — the studio builds product, not advertising
- No staffing-only (we don't lend out individual developers; we deliver scoped projects and retainers)
- No work below a quality bar that requires shortcuts that bite back later — small projects are welcome, sloppy ones are not
